title: BEM-918 worker request
objective:
Create file governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM918_FULL_WORKING_SYSTEM_ROADMAP_REQUEST.md with content # BEM-918 FULL WORKING SYSTEM ROADMAP REQUEST
Status: SENT_TO_CURATOR
Route: External GPT auditor -> Curator -> Worker -> Curator -> external mailbox
Objective: prepare a detailed working roadmap to turn the system from protocol/scaffold into a fully working system.
Operator clarification:
- The operator does not need concepts anymore.
- The repository already contains a Telegram mechanism that previously sent messages.
- The roadmap must use the existing implementation and technical documentation, not an abstract Telegram idea.
- The entire system must become operational, not only Telegram.
Required inputs:
- Existing Deno service: ai-devops-telegram-curator-webhook.
- Existing endpoints: Telegram webhook POST /, /autonomy, /autonomy-trigger, /autonomy-backlog-trigger, /gpt-safe-run, /gpt-safe-status, /codex-task, /codex-status.
- Existing codex contour: ChatGPT -> /codex-task -> codex-runner.yml -> /codex-status.
- BEM-917 protocol: Telegram targets General Director OBJ-GD-001 via EL-CUR-GD-001; report default period 1 hour; reports follow canon.
- Claude audit findings for v1.7: JSON-only agents, commit_sha null, no live consumer, GPT self-validation, stale queue, missing architecture canon, insufficient event log, no GD/DIR prompts.
- BEM-907..BEM-913 remediation partial pass.
Worker must produce an execution roadmap with practical phases:
1. Repo discovery and technical inventory freeze.
2. Telegram operator interface implementation using existing webhook, not new abstract bot.
3. Telegram command parser and task envelope.
4. Route Telegram -> General Director Curator -> managed channel -> policy gate -> dispatch queue.
5. Working report pipeline from General Director/Director/Curator to Telegram using canonical format and operator report period default 1 hour.
6. Deterministic dispatch consumer and queue lifecycle.
7. Object runner lifecycle for GD/DIR/Worker and worker contours.
8. CI/Git proof hardening and commit SHA evidence.
9. End-to-end tests from Telegram message to task completion and Telegram report.
10. Re-audit package for Claude.
Worker must define acceptance criteria, proof files, operator gates, and exact BEM task sequence.
Expected status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES or BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
No issue comments.
